DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT SNOW PARK TECHNOLOGIES, LLC'S MOTION TO ENFORCE THE COURT'S MAY 14, 2008 ORDER, AND REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. THE MOTION INCORRECTLY ASSUMES THAT THE PREVIOUS ORDER DETERMINED THE ADEQUACY OF THE SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES SERVED PRIOR TO THE HEARING. THE OPPOSITION CORRECTLY POINTS OUT THAT THERE HAS BEEN NO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING THOSE RESPONSES AND FURTHER, THAT THE PRESENT MOTION DOES NOT IDENTIFY THE INADEQUACIES OF THOSE RESPONSES. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
